case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JANEEN RENEE BRAVO

docket_entries.description: ORDER DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED.
